title: T-Rav's More Villagers
description: This Resource pack add in more diversity to your villages
body:
Have you ever wanted more diversity in your villages? T-Rav's More Villagers have over 1,200 villager textures, over 300 zombie villager textures, and over 1,200 wondering trader textures. Now your villages will feel more alive with this resource pack!

**Requires Optifine or Entity Texture Feature mod**
- Optifine: https://www.optifine.net/home
- Entity Texture Feature: [https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

**This pack includes:**
Biome Specific Textures,
- Normal Villagers, Elves, Dwarfs, and Mushroom Villagers
- Different Hair Styles, Different Skin, Eyes, and Hair Color 
- Ages between Young, Middle Age, and Elder Villagers
